entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-WritingDataIntoFile Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String>exception in writing datajava.io.FileNotFoundException: D:\csv files\Groups\CN=G1,OU=DemoGroups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com.xml\CN=G10,OU=DemoGroups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com.xml (The system cannot find the path specified)</String>
